payload.body:
## Sprint
- Sprint ID: S16
- Objective: Harden the system for real-world release: deterministic replay/regression fixtures, long-run stability checks, adapter resilience behaviors, and GUI recovery tooling.

## Scope + Budgets
- Whitelist used: `src/s16/**`, `tests/s16/**`, `docs/backlog/**`, `docs/sprints/README.md`, `docs/sprints/S16/**`
- File-touch cap: minimal adjacent module + tests + sprint docs/evidence only
- Budgets:
  - Max net new lines in existing non-doc file <= 120: PASS
  - Max touched file LOC <= 1200: PASS (`src/s16/hardening.ts` 290 LOC; `tests/s16/s16.test.ts` 232 LOC)
  - Max modified function length <= 80 lines: PASS

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S16-01 deterministic replay fixture hash parity
- [x] AT-S16-02 long-run stability + deterministic adapter resilience
- [x] AT-S16-03 GUI recovery actions through shared executor/whitelist/receipt path

## Marker/Signature Lists
- `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`
- `Unhandled Runtime Error`
- `Application error`
- `Hydration failed`
- `Cannot read properties of undefined`
- `TypeError:`
- `Date.now(` / `Math.random(`
- `localStorage(` / `sessionStorage(`
- hardcoded absolute path markers: `/Users/`, `/Volumes/`, `C:\`

## Evidence Paths
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/INDEX.md`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/preflight/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/at/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/gates/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/scope/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/maintainability/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/stoplight/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/regression/`
- `docs/sprints/S16/evidence/hardening/`
payload.title: [S16] perf : hardening + regression suite
